title: RPG Resenha
description: Ice and Fire, RPG Series, Aquamirae, Origins, Stellarity, GrappilingHook, Farmer's Delight, Mine Cells, etc.
body:
It's a RPG World.
There are 120 mods in total, without counting libraries.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(195 counting all mods, 36 are just for making the game smoother)

</details>

The main thing is exploration and mining.
Basically, my modpack has:
- A bunch of [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) Addons                    
- All RPG Series to 1.20.1                                                                                      
- [Mine Cells](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecells)                                                           
- [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric)                                          
- [Pufferfish's Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills)                                                     
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)                                                             
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)                                                        
- A bunch of structure mods like [AdoraBuild: Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorabuildstructures), [Cherry Grove Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cherry-villages), [Tidal Towns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tidal-towns) and many more!
